3309270.name: Hero's Odyssey: Summoned into Ancient Greece with a Quest I Didn't Ask For!
3309270.description:
On one faithfull day filled with grief and despair the tragedy happens and you’re striken by a thunderbolt. But it’s not all bad, somehow you’re awaken on the beach in Dalmatheia - a world of ancient greek mythos, full of gods, monsters, but also kindness and companions willing to sacrifice themselves for the success of your mission. What mission you might ask, the one Zeus himself tasks you to!

Explore the land inspired by ancient Greece, Build a team, become the hero of your own story. And once you embark on the quest you might learn the truth behind your sudden appearance, behind your grief and behind gods’ war. It’s time to shape your destiny.

Take on a role of a university literature student - unremarkable, unprepared, and undeniably human. But when you're hurled into a war of gods, your hidden powers, gifts from Zeus himself begin to awaken. You’ll grow from a confused outsider into a leader, mastering thunderous abilities and swordsmanship while facing choices that challenge your morals, loyalty, and identity. Every path you take carves a different legend, and not all roads lead to glory.

Kallias is your ride-or-die, a charming satyr, the heart of the group, and the 1st creature to welcome you in Damatheia. He’s stubborn, loyal, and wildly hedonistic, living life like an eternal Greek summer. His jokes keep spirits high even in Hades’ darkest corners, but his carefree nature hides a deeper wisdom and unwavering support. Kallias is both the glue that holds the party together and a reminder of what you’re fighting for

Vespera is a sharp-tongued assassin with a temper as deadly as her blade. Cold and explosive, she clashes with others easily… especially you. But behind the tsundere walls and her sharp tongue lies a guarded heart and a painful secret she desperately wants to keep buried. Get close enough, and you might see the soft and sweet side she hides even from herself.

Honor in her heart and steel in her hand that’s Helena, a warrior whose code is as unyielding as her blade. Straightforward and fiercely loyal, she has no patience for mind games. She’s the type to leap into the fire with you rather than let you face it alone. In combat, she shines like a mythic heroine: sexy, strong, and relentless. But beneath it all lies a surprisingly gentle heart, and a secret tender enough to crack even the hardest shell. Helena fights for justice… and maybe, if you prove yourself, for you too.

Withdrawn, silent, shut away like a forgotten temple - Datura is the quiet shadow of war-torn trauma. A classic kuudere with a tragic, ancient twist. An orphan taken in by Melaina, she rarely speaks, but when she does… you’d better listen. Seemingly cold and distant, deep down she still clings to the hope that the world can be fixed. But first, she’ll have to try putting herself back together. Datura is a riddle that won’t ask for help, but maybe you’re the one who can solve her.

A seasoned merchant who could sell you sand on the beach… or faith in a better tomorrow. Melaina is the oldest and most mature in the group with brains and bite. Warm, sharp, and fiercely maternal. Taking in Datura showed the size of her heart, but war has taken more from her than she lets on. She can disarm you with a glance and put you back on your feet with one sharp phrase. She’s a wise leader who’s been through hell… but maybe she’s still hoping to find someone to walk the rest of the road with.

6 chapters - the story has been split into 6 chapters totaling around 14 hours of gameplay. With whopping 135 000 words.

5 Intriguing partners - on your journey you’ll be accompanied by 5 characters, with their own stories, motivations and impact. Discover their truth, earn their trust and maybe have a happily ever after.

6 Unique Endings - Experience the story of our hero led by your choices. Be smart, be brave and see where that gets you. As some endings might be merry, other hide a terrifying path only for those brave of heart.

Partial English Voice Acting - Witness the story in all its glory brought to life by the amazing voice actors pulling you into the story with their gasps, warcries and words.

Fresh take on isekai - experience the story of being brought to another world full of gods, adventure, but also horror and… romance?

100 CGs - Enjoy the story captivated within over 100 beautifully crafted CGs.

Captivating Minigames - Dive deeper into the world with charming minigames that enrich the story and engage your senses.
3309270.supported_languages:
英语*, 波兰语*, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲
*具有完全音频支持的语言
